com.newland.nsdk.core.api.internal.analogserial

Interface AnalogSerialManager

  • All Superinterfaces:
    Module
    Deprecated. 
    This module can use USBSerialPort instead, which created by SerialPortManager.createInstance(SerialPortType, SerialPortSettings).

    public interface AnalogSerialManager
extends Module
    Provides analog serial related operations

    How to get this Module:

         Note:Declare permission in AndroidManifest.xml before using this interface
     < uses-permission android:name="android.permission.MANAGE_ANALOG_SERIAL" />

     AnalogSerialManager mAnalogSerialManager = (AnalogSerialManager) NSDKModuleManagerImpl.getInstance().getModuleType(ModuleType.ANALOG_SERIAL);

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods Deprecated Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      void close()
      Deprecated. 
      Close device analog serial.
      java.lang.String getPortName()
      Deprecated. 
      Get available port name.
      int ioctl(int cmd, byte[] args)
      Deprecated. 
      JNI interface, operate corresponding device, this should be called after calling AnalogSerialManager.open().
      boolean isMacMode()
      Deprecated.  
      void open()
      Deprecated. 
      Open device analog serial.
      void open(java.lang.String portName)
      Deprecated. 
      Open designated portName device analog serial

      Deprecated. 
      Read data from serial port, this shall be called after calling AnalogSerialManager.open().
      void setConfig(SerialPortSettings serialPortSettings)
      Deprecated. 
      Set analog serial configuration
      void setMacMode(boolean isMac)
      Deprecated.  
      void write(byte[] buf, int maxLength, int timeout)
      Deprecated. 
      Write data to serial port, this shall be called after calling AnalogSerialManager.open().

    • Method Detail

      • open

        void open()
   throws NSDKException
        Deprecated. 
        Open device analog serial.

        Note:This shall be called before read, write and ioctl, supports X5.

        Throws:
        NSDKException

      • open

        void open(java.lang.String portName)
   throws NSDKException
        Deprecated. 
        Open designated portName device analog serial

        Note:This shall be called before read, write and ioctl, and shall be called after getPostName() to get available port name.

        For Example:

             AnalogSerialManager mAnalogSerialManager = (AnalogSerialManager) NSDKModuleManagerImpl.getInstance().getModule(ModuleType.ANALOG_SERIAL);
     try {
         String portName = mAnalogSerialManager.getPortName();
         mAnalogSerialManager.open(portName);
     } catch(NSDKException e) {
         e.printStackTrack();
     }
        Parameters:
        portName - [Required] The port designated.
        Throws:
        NSDKException

      • close

        void close()
    throws NSDKException
        Deprecated. 
        Close device analog serial.
        Throws:
        NSDKException

      • getPortName

        java.lang.String getPortName()
                      throws NSDKException
        Deprecated. 
        Get available port name.
        Returns:
        Available port name.
        Throws:
        NSDKException

      • setConfig

        void setConfig(SerialPortSettings serialPortSettings)
        throws NSDKException
        Deprecated. 
        Set analog serial configuration

        For Example:

                AnalogSerialManager analogSerialManager = (AnalogSerialManager) NSDKModuleManagerImpl.getInstance().getModule(ModuleType.ANALOG_SERIAL);
        SerialPortSettings serialPortSettings = new SerialPortSetting(BaudRate.BPS115200, DataBits.DATA_BIT_5, ParityBit.ODD_CHECK, StopBits.STOP_BIT_TWO, true, false);
         try {
             analogSerialManager.setConfig(serialPortSettings);
         } catch (NSDKException e) {
             e.printStackTrace();
         }
        Parameters:
        serialPortSettings - [Optional] Serial configurations to be set, seeSerialPortSettings.
          If it is null, default values will be applied.
        • Default baud rate: BaudRate.BPS115200
        • Default data bits: DataBits.DATA_BIT_8
        • Default parity bit: ParityBit.NO_CHECK
        • Default stop bits: StopBits.STOP_BIT_ONE
        • Default isIrEnabled: "N"
        • Default isBlocked: "N"
        Throws:
        NSDKException

      • ioctl

        int ioctl(int cmd,
          byte[] args)
   throws NSDKException
        Deprecated. 
        JNI interface, operate corresponding device, this should be called after calling AnalogSerialManager.open().

        For Example:

             AnalogSerialManager mAnalogSerialManager = (AnalogSerialManager) NSDKModuleManagerImpl.getInstance().getModule(ModuleType.ANALOG_SERIAL);
     byte[] args = new byte[1];
     args[0] = 0;
     try {
         mAnalogSerialManager.open();
         mAnalogSerialManager.ioctl(0x540B, args);
     } catch(NSDKException e) {
          e.printStackTrace();
     }
        Parameters:
        cmd - [Required] Command. cmd = 0x540B means clear buffer, cmd = 0x541B means detect buffer data volume.
        args - Optional Parameters, different args means different operation.
          when cmd = 0x540B:
        • TCIFLSH:args[0] = 0, clear serial input buffer.
        • TCOFLSH:args[0] = 1, clear serial output buffer.
        • TCIOFLSH:args[0] = 2, clear serial input and output buffer.
          when cmd = 0x541B:
        • FINEAR:args[0] = 0, check the serial port input buffer.
        • FONEAR:args[0] = 1, check the serial port output buffer.
        Returns:
        Result of ioctl.
          result = 0: success.
        • when cmd = 0x540B, clear serial buffer success
        • when cmd = 0x541B, serial buffer is null
          result > 0: success.
        • only when cmd = 0x541B, the length of valid buffer data.
          result < 0: fail.
        • especially when result = -14:Unsupported Device
        Throws:
        NSDKException

      • read

        byte[] read(int maxLength,
            int timeout)
     throws NSDKException
        Deprecated. 
        Read data from serial port, this shall be called after calling AnalogSerialManager.open().

        For Example:

             AnalogSerialManager mAnalogSerialManager = (AnalogSerialManager) NSDKModuleManagerImpl.getInstance().getModule(ModuleType.ANALOG_SERIAL);
     try {
         mAnalogSerialManager.open();
         byte[] data = mAnalogSerialManager.read(100, 5);
     } catch(NSDKException e) {
         e.printStackTrack();
     }
        Parameters:
        maxLength - [required] Max read data length, each time can only read no more than 2048 data.
        timeout - [required] Read timeout(s). When timeout <=0, read immediately.
        Returns:
        Serial port data. When >0 means Read data volume, =-1 means failed.
        Throws:
        NSDKException

      • write

        void write(byte[] buf,
           int maxLength,
           int timeout)
    throws NSDKException
        Deprecated. 
        Write data to serial port, this shall be called after calling AnalogSerialManager.open().

        For Example:

             AnalogSerialManager mAnalogSerialManager = (AnalogSerialManager) NSDKModuleManagerImpl.getInstance().getModule(ModuleType.ANALOG_SERIAL);
     byte[] data = ISOUtils.hex2byte("ABGGSJWKDH123");
     try {
         mAnalogSerialManager.open();
         mAnalogSerialManager.write(data, 20, 5);
     } catch(NSDKException e) {
         e.printStackTrack();
     }
        Parameters:
        buf - [required] Data to be written to serial port.
        maxLength - [required] Write max data length.
        timeout - [required] Write timeout(s). When timeout <=0, write immediately.
        Throws:
        NSDKException

      • setMacMode

        void setMacMode(boolean isMac)
         throws NSDKException
        Deprecated. 
        Set serial port communication mode to mac mode.
        Parameters:
        isMac - True: mac mode, False: windows mode
        Throws:
        NSDKException

      • isMacMode

        boolean isMacMode()
           throws NSDKException
        Deprecated. 
        Check the current mode whether mac mode.
        Returns:
        True: mac mode, False: windows mode
        Throws:
        NSDKException
